tasks.title: Lock Referral Source Vocabulary
tasks.verification_requirement: Exactly one surviving non-purchase membership source label is chosen; the label is `referral`; `invite` is retired from target vocabulary.
stop_conditions: Any proposal preserves multiple surviving labels
Any proposal keeps `invite` as canonical vocabulary

tasks.title: Lock Canonical Create-Profile Surface And Ownership Split
tasks.verification_requirement: Canonical create-profile execution surface is `POST /auth/onboarding/create-profile`; `/profiles/me` remains projection-only; required name, optional bio, and optional image ownership split is explicit.
stop_conditions: Any proposal makes `/profiles/me` create-profile authority
Any proposal makes create-profile media authority

tasks.title: Lock Canonical Application-Subject Naming
tasks.verification_requirement: `app.auth_subjects` is named as the canonical application subject authority for onboarding subject state, app-level role subject fields, and app-level admin subject fields.
stop_conditions: Any competing subject-owner naming survives
Any proposal weakens the canonical authority phrase

tasks.title: Rewrite Active Contract Corpus To Remove Invite As Active Doctrine
